pages.text: $(li)$(bold)Item Vault$() — a multi-block box for huge stacks of one or many items; the standard Create bulk store, and what the package network draws from.$(li)$(bold)Fluid Tank$() — the same idea for liquids, and the body of steam boilers.$(br2)Novus also adds $(l:7_shelf/connected)Create: Vibrant Vaults$(), which gives the item vault new material variants for cleaner builds.
pages.title: Vaults & Tanks
